The June Consumer Price Index is expected at 3.8% year on year and monthly CPI is forecast to dip 0.1%. In plain terms, this would signal some easing in the cost of living even as core inflation is seen steady at 2.9%. At the...

The Cboe-listed funds seek to deliver two times short (-200%) the daily performance of their underlying target stocks.

news.headline: Eli Lilly (LLY) Wins Full FDA Approval For Retevmo In Broader Cancers
news.summary: FDA grants full approval to Eli Lilly's selpercatinib (Retevmo) for a wider group of adult and pediatric patients with RET fusion solid tumors. The decision shifts selpercatinib from accelerated to traditional approval and broadens its labeled use across multiple tumor types. The update reinforces Eli Lilly's (NYSE:LLY) position in oncology and opens new commercial and clinical avenues for the drug. Eli Lilly, known for its oncology and biopharma portfolio, now has a fully approved RET...

news.headline: US Stock Market Today: S&P 500 Futures Slip As Traders Eye Key CPI Data
news.summary: The Morning Bull - US Market Morning Update Wednesday, Jul, 15 2026 US stock futures are mixed in early trade, with S&P 500 contracts edging slightly lower while Nasdaq futures tick higher, as investors weigh cooling inflation hopes against rising geopolitical risks. The June Consumer Price Index is expected at 3.8% year on year and monthly CPI is forecast to dip 0.1%. In plain terms, this would signal some easing in the cost of living even as core inflation is seen steady at 2.9%. At the...
